text: Some experts believe we are moving toward Artificial General Intelligence, or AGI, which is a type of AI that can think and learn like a human. Unlike current AI, which is good at specific tasks, AGI would be able to handle many different problems. The potential benefits are huge: it could help cure diseases, solve climate change, and make education better for everyone. However, there are also serious risks, such as job losses or AI being used for harmful purposes. When might this happen? Predictions vary widely—some think it could occur in ten years, while others say it will take much longer. Either way, the future of AI will impact all of us.
